Suzerain Modding Kit
Table of Contents

Class ConversationNode

Namespace
SuzerainModdingKit.StoryFragments.Conversation
Assembly
SuzerainModdingKit.dll

A dialogue line or choice in a conversation.

public class ConversationNode
Inheritance
object
ConversationNode
Inherited Members
object.Equals(object)
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()

object.ToString()

Constructors

ConversationNode(string, string, IReadOnlyList<ConversationNodeHook>, IReadOnlyList<ConversationNodeSelector>, CharacterSelector, string, string, string)

Creates a new instance of this class.

public ConversationNode(string name, string text, IReadOnlyList<ConversationNodeHook> hooks = null, IReadOnlyList<ConversationNodeSelector> nextNodes = null, CharacterSelector speakerSelector = null, string luaScript = null, string luaCondition = null, string sequence = null)

Parameters

name string

The unique identifier of the node.

text string

The text of the node.

hooks IReadOnlyList<ConversationNodeHook>

Optional: A list of hooks. Hooks are nodes that this node should attach (or hook) to. Hooks should only be used when trying to link to a node that you don't control (such as a node from vanilla Suzerain or another mod). If you control the node you are trying to hook to, you should add this node to the other node's NextNodes instead.

nextNodes IReadOnlyList<ConversationNodeSelector>

Optional: A list of next node selectors. These are the nodes that will show after this one. Only the first node with a successful condition will show. If the nodes are choices, all choice nodes with successful conditions will show.

speakerSelector CharacterSelector

Optional: The speaker of the line. If null, the node will be considered a choice rather than a dialogue line.

luaScript string

Optional: A Lua script to run when the dialogue is spoken.

luaCondition string

Optional: A Lua condition to determine whether the dialogue should be spoken or not.

sequence string

Optional: Conversation-related actions to perform when this dialogue is spoken. See ConversationNodeSequenceBuilder.

Exceptions

ArgumentNullException

Thrown if any required arguments are null.

Properties

Hooks

A read-only list of hooks.

public ReadOnlyCollection<ConversationNodeHook> Hooks { get; }

Property Value

ReadOnlyCollection<ConversationNodeHook>

Remarks

Hooks are nodes that this node should attach (or hook) to.

IsChoice

Returns a boolean indicating whether the node should be considered a choice (is SpeakerSelector null?).

public bool IsChoice { get; }

Property Value

bool

LuaCondition

An optional Lua condition to determine whether the dialogue should be spoken or not.

public string LuaCondition { get; }

Property Value

string

LuaScript

An optional Lua script to run when the dialogue is spoken.

public string LuaScript { get; }

Property Value

string

Name

The unique identifier of the node.

public string Name { get; }

Property Value

string

NextNodes

A read-only list of next node selectors.

public ReadOnlyCollection<ConversationNodeSelector> NextNodes { get; }

Property Value

ReadOnlyCollection<ConversationNodeSelector>

Remarks

These are the nodes that will show after this one. Only the first node with a successful condition will show. If the nodes are choices, all choice nodes with successful conditions will show.

Sequence

Optional conversation-related actions to perform when this dialogue is spoken.

public string Sequence { get; }

Property Value

string
See Also
ConversationNodeSequenceBuilder

SpeakerSelector

The speaker of the line. This property is optional. If null, the node should be considered a choice rather than a dialogue line.

public CharacterSelector SpeakerSelector { get; }

Property Value

CharacterSelector

Text

The text of the node.
